subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! I bear witness that Thou hast created Thy servants for Thy recognition and their presence before Thy face, and to stand in Thy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی اشهد انک خلقت العباد لعرفانک و حضورهم امام وجهک و القیام لدی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
